name: Cheesecake a La Chase-Park Plaza
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8 inch springform pan with a graham cracker crust and chill slightly.
2. Cream together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then add the vanilla, orange rind, and lemon rind.
4. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared crust.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 230°F for 2 hours and 40 minutes.
